rationale: The confirmed US air strike killing the Tren de Aragua gang leader is a concrete domestic security action with real policy implications for US residents; all other headlines are noise or continuation. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike, Trump says
top_events.summary: A confirmed US military strike eliminated the Tren de Aragua gang leader — a direct domestic security action affecting immigration and gang policy debates for US residents.

top_events.title: Twelve killed in plane crash in US state of Missouri
